title: festuca laevis
intro: Festuca laevis, also known as smooth meadow-grass or smooth fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Festuca laevis include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Festuca laevis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being and address various health concerns.
